inputs.text: Create an original editorial conceptual photomontage for a premium AI news digest cover image, 16:9. Topic: AI regulation and legal oversight. Core editorial angle: institutions are building legal structure around powerful AI systems. Visual metaphor: public architecture framing intelligence inside a legal boundary. Include a monumental civic building, legal documents, structural framing elements, and a restrained technological layer embedded into the scene. Strong editorial photomontage, layered paper collage logic, matte paper texture, soft print grain, muted coral, mustard, teal, dusty blue, graphite, off-white, asymmetrical editorial balance, one clear focal point, thoughtful negative space.

glowing orb, glowing neural sphere, floating dashboard tiles, centered business hero, browser-window stack, world map plus chip cliche, literal AI text, readable typography, watermark, logo, signature, extra fingers, broken hands, deformed anatomy, duplicate people, melted face, over-detailed background clutter, generic sci-fi HUD, cheap neon cyberpunk, oversaturated colors, glossy 3d render, stock-photo smile, symmetric layout, low contrast focal hierarchy, bad perspective, malformed architecture
